title: Build wrapper: simemu do $SESSION build
description:
Add a `build` action to `simemu do` that wraps xcodebuild (iOS) and gradle (Android) with the correct device targeting.

The wrapper should:

1. Read the session's platform (ios/android) and UDID from session state
2. Accept unified flags that map to platform-specific build tool flags
3. Optionally read build config from keel's `execution.yaml` if present in the project
4. Return the path to the built artifact (.app or .apk) so the next `install` doesn't need a path

## Unified flags (cross-platform naming)

| simemu flag | iOS (xcodebuild) | Android (gradle) |
|-------------|-------------------|-------------------|
| `--scheme <name>` | `-scheme <name>` | (ignored) |
| `--project <path>` | `-project <path>` | (ignored, uses cwd) |
| `--flavour <name>` | maps to scheme suffix or xcconfig | `-Pflavour=<name>` or task name |
| `--config debug/release` | `-configuration Debug/Release` | `assembleDebug` / `assembleRelease` |
| `--clean` | add `clean` before `build` | `clean` task |
| `--test` | `test` instead of `build` | `test` task |

## Behaviour

### iOS
```bash
simemu do $SESSION build --scheme Goala-mock --config debug
# internally runs:
# xcodebuild -project Goala.xcodeproj -scheme Goala-mock \
#   -destination "id=$UDID" -configuration Debug \
#   CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
```

### Android
```bash
simemu do $SESSION build --config debug
# internally runs:
# cd <project-path> && ./gradlew assembleDebug
```

### Auto-install after build
If build succeeds, store the artifact path in session state so that the next `simemu do $SESSION install` (with no path arg) uses the just-built artifact.

```bash
simemu do $SESSION build --scheme MyApp
simemu do $SESSION install   # ← picks up the .app from the build
simemu do $SESSION launch com.example.app
```

### keel execution.yaml integration (optional)
If the project has `keel/execution.yaml` with `buildCommands`, the wrapper can read it as defaults:
```yaml
buildCommands:
  ios: |
    xcodebuild -scheme Goala-mock ...
```
But explicit `--scheme` / `--config` flags always override.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `simemu do $SESSION build` works for iOS (xcodebuild)
- [ ] `simemu do $SESSION build` works for Android (gradle)
- [ ] `--scheme`, `--project`, `--config`, `--clean`, `--test` flags work
- [ ] `--flavour` maps correctly on both platforms
- [ ] Built artifact path stored in session state
- [ ] `simemu do $SESSION install` with no path picks up the last build
- [ ] Error messages include the exact build command that failed
